name: Sophia, Goddess of Rebirth
effectText: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 face-up Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, and Xyz Monster from anywhere on the field. This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. If this card is Special Summoned: Banish all other cards from both players' hands, fields, and GYs. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.
